rationale: Verified 2 stale MEDIUM bugs were already fixed in code (FACTION_SCORE_START=20, randi() for minigames). Main work: created RetroRenderPipeline autoload — unified PSX/N64 post-processing shader with Bayer 8x8 dithering, color quantization, time-of-day tinting, seasonal color grading. Addresses creator feedback q-20260412-004 (PSX/N64 aesthetic) and q-20260412-002 (ambiance changes by time/season).
next_cycle_plan: Wire RetroRenderPipeline.set_biome_tint() into TransitionBiome and Run3D scenes for per-biome color grading. Consider adding vertex jitter shader for 3D objects (PS1 vertex snapping). Playtest visual stack: PSX(98) + border(99) + CRT(100).
